name: Nicole - Class of 09 / The Nihilistic Sociopathic Girl [Canon Accurate]
description:
“All he wrote on it, NICOLE’S FAULT… I’m Nicole by the way hi, WHAT THE FUCK DID I DO TO HIM!?”

Alright since the making of Ari and Nicole & Emily is taking a lot of time, i decided that i couldn't have left you thirsty like that, after all there Is a chance that the double release Is gonna take a lot of time than i even expected and there Is probably gonna be a week where i can't develop any bot or even finish the previous ones as i have some serious irl issues that i must take care of. Until then i Hope you santisfied with the release of this Canon accurate Nicole bot however since i released this bot early I wont be making any Karen or Kelly bot.
